metadata.title: Germany EOR Services | Employer of Record Germany – Jackson & Frank
metadata.description: Germany EOR and Employer of Record Germany services. Hire employees in Germany without entity. German employment laws 2026, Germany payroll outsourcing, social security compliance, visa support. Onboard in 2–3 days. Book a demo.
keywords: hire employees in Germany without entity

faqs.title: Germany EOR FAQs
faqs.subtitle: Quick answers on cost, timeline, legal risks, and contracts for Employer of Record in Germany.

items.question: How much does Germany EOR cost?
items.answer: Germany EOR pricing typically includes a monthly management fee per employee plus the cost of salary, benefits, employer social security contributions (Krankenversicherung, Rentenversicherung, Arbeitslosenversicherung, Pflegeversicherung), and taxes. At Jackson & Frank we offer transparent pricing with no hidden fees. Total cost depends on headcount, salary levels, and benefits. Book a demo for a custom quote.

items.question: How fast can I hire someone in Germany with EOR?
items.answer: With Jackson & Frank Germany EOR, you can onboard new hires in 2–3 business days once we have signed contracts and employee details. No local entity (GmbH/AG) is required, so you avoid months of setup time.

items.question: What are the legal risks of hiring in Germany without an entity?
items.answer: When you use a compliant Germany EOR like Jackson & Frank, the EOR is the legal employer in Germany. They assume employment law (Kündigungsschutzgesetz), social security, tax, and compliance risk. You avoid misclassification, permanent establishment, and local registration issues as long as you work with a licensed, established provider.

items.question: What type of employment contract does Germany EOR use?
items.answer: Employees are hired under a German employment contract (Arbeitsvertrag) compliant with German law (BGB, Kündigungsschutzgesetz), including notice periods, probation (Probezeit), vacation entitlement, and mandatory social security contributions. Jackson & Frank issues the contract from our German entity so it is fully local and enforceable.

items.question: Can you sponsor visas for Germany EOR employees?
items.answer: Yes. We support visa sponsorship and the EU Blue Card program in Germany, plus work permits and residence permit coordination through Ausländerbehörde, so you can hire non-EU talent through our Germany EOR.
